feed.title: Docket updates for X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-07-15 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Order on Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice

entry.title: Entry #365 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: NOTICE of Attorney Appearance by John M Hughes on behalf of X Corp, X.AI LLC. (Filer confirms contact info in ECF is current.) (Hughes, John) (Entered: 07/07/2026)

entry.title: Entry #364 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: NOTICE of Compliance with Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray's May 13, 2026 Order re: 274 Order on Motion to Compel,,,,,,,, filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 07/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #363 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: NOTICE of Attorney Appearance by Anne Y Lee on behalf of Apple Inc. (Filer confirms contact info in ECF is current.) (Lee, Anne) (Entered: 06/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #362 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court DENIES the Motion (ECF No. 353 ) without prejudice to OpenAI's right to request relief and Court intervention at the appropriate time. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 6/26/2026) (saw) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #361 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the Motion for Expedited Status Conference. ECF No. 353 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is REFERRED to Judge Ray. re: 353 MOTION for Expedited Status Conference Motion referred to Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/26/2026) (saw) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #360 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed Appendix in Support re: 359 Sealed and/or Ex Parte Motion, filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C.(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (saw) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #359 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed OpenAI's Motion for Expedited Status Conference filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C.(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (saw) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #358 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the Motion to Seal. ECF No. 352 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is GRANTED. (Clerk to enter the sealed and/or ex parte document as of the date of this order.) (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/26/2026) (saw) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #357 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER granting 351 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Joseph C. Smith, Jr.. Important Reminder: Unless excused for cause, an attorney who is not an ECF user must register within 14 days of the date the attorney appears in a case pursuant to LR 5.1(f) and LCrR 49.2(g). (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/26/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #356 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 355 Response/Objection (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #352 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of Request for Expedited Status Conference (Sealed pursuant to motion to seal) filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Sealed Request for Expedited Status Conference, # 2 Proposed Sealed Appendix, # 3 Proposed Order)(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (Ackerman, Michael) (Entered: 06/25/2026)

entry.title: Entry #351 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914

entry.title: Entry #349 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice with Certificate of Good Standing for Attorney Elena Musz (Filing fee $100; Receipt number ATXNDC-16556502) filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Hilton, Christopher) (Entered: 06/23/2026)

entry.title: Entry #348 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the Motion to Withdraw. ECF No. 347 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is GRANTED. Accordingly, the Court ORDERS that Andrew Gonzalez is WITHDRAWN as Counsel for Defendant Apple, Inc. Attorney Andrew B Gonzales terminated (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/23/2026) (saw) (Entered: 06/23/2026)

entry.title: Entry #347 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Unopposed MOTION to Withdraw as Attorney of Apple Inc. by Andrew Gonzales filed by Apple Inc (Kelly, Dee) (Entered: 06/22/2026)

entry.title: Entry #342 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER denying 335 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of John Hughes. Clerk shall return admission fee to Applicant. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/18/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 06/18/2026)

entry.title: Entry #341 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court hereby ORDERS that the mediation deadline is extended to December 4, 2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/18/2026) (saw) (Entered: 06/18/2026)
